summary: Average show with Hell In A Bucket highlighted and strong Scarlet>Fire, Samson and Terrapin performances, but recording quality is not documented.
review: The concert is viewed as a fairly average outing overall – the first set was unremarkable while the pre‑drums portion of the second set shines, especially the Scarlet>Fire sequence, a ripping Samson, and a well‑played Terrapin. Hell In A Bucket receives a specific shout‑out as a highlight. No reviewers commented on the audio source or fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews give modest to positive scores (3 and 4 stars) with no recording comments, leading to an average show rating around 3.5 and a neutral assumed recording quality; combined weighted score yields ~3.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss sound clarity, mix or source type, so the recording is presumed average but unverified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as average; pre‑drums second set highlighted as strong with several standout jams; post‑drum portion deemed decent.
